options.name: <fileName>
options.description: Specifies the name of the DEF file you want to compare with

options.name: -bump
options.description: Compares bump placement, routing, and net assignment

options.name: -checkCellPrefix
options.description: Checks instances whose instance name begins with the specified prefix

options.name: -defAsGolden
options.description: Treats the DEF file as the golden

options.name: -ignoreLayerFrom
options.description: Ignores the specified metal or cut layer, and all metal and cut layers above ((layer), optional)

options.name: -ignoreLayerTo
options.description: Ignores the specified metal or cut layer, and all metal and cut layers below ((layer), optional)

options.name: -ignoreLogicChange
options.description: Ignores logic changes when comparing a DEF file

options.name: -metalShapeDiff
options.description: Post-processes the original report file to provide only differences on metal layers

options.name: -placeBlockage
options.description: Compares placement blockage and block halo equivalence

options.name: -reportFile
options.description: Specifies the name of the report containing the results

options.name: -row
options.description: Compares row and site equivalence, name, location, and orientation

options.name: -unit
options.description: Uses the specified UNITS value (typically, the UNITS value in the DEF file) to scale all
